title: Remove or Hide "Item Limit" Notification in Goals Widget
excerpt: I am currently using the “Goals” widget in a dashboard, and the persistent bar that displays the message “This widget is limited to 500 items” is quite distracting and detracts from the overall visual experience. It woul…

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am currently using the “Goals” widget in a dashboard, and the persistent bar that displays the message “This widget is limited to 500 items” is quite distracting and detracts from the overall visual experience. It would be greatly appreciated if there were an option to hide or remove this notification from view once acknowledged, as it interrupts the clean and streamlined design of the dashboard.

image779×202 8.68 KB

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mark!

Shanine here from Mindflows. Currently, there is no way to remove or hide the “Item Limit” notification in the Goals Widget. The notification is designed to inform users when they have reached the item limit. Hopefully, they will have this soon!

Request a feature here: Feature requests - monday Community Forum
